facebook.caption: Looking for a resort that blends genuine Thai-inspired hospitality with a laid-back Phu Quoc vibe? Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach Resort on Tran Hung Dao Street sits right along the island's most lively strip, giving you easy access to restaurants, bars, and the beach without sacrificing that polished resort feel. Rated 4.7 out of 5 across over 2,300 reviews, guests consistently love the warm service and well-kept grounds. Practical tip: book a room with a pool view early, as this property fills up fast during peak season from November to April.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun dip behind the palms at Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach Resort, where the pool shimmers and staff greet you like you've been here before. The clips say it all: clean, breezy, and genuinely welcoming. This is what 4.7 stars looks like in real life on Tran Hung Dao.

instagram.caption: 4.7 stars, 2,300+ happy guests, and a location right on Tran Hung Dao. Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach Resort brings polished hospitality to Phu Quoc without the stiff formality. Pro tip: arrive in the dry season for the best experience.
instagram.video_caption: Pool sparkle, swaying palms, and staff who actually remember your name. Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach Resort is giving us all the right holiday feelings on Tran Hung Dao.

tiktok.caption: This resort on Tran Hung Dao just gave us 4.7-star energy and we are not surprised. Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach Resort, Phu Quoc. #PhuQuoc #DusitPrincess #VietnamTravel #BeachResort
